problem_raw: Our HR department is struggling with manual onboarding.
problem_refined: HR onboarding takes 14 days via manual email and paper. 50 hires/month need Email, Slack, HRIS access on day 1 but provisioning delays average 4 days. Goal: reduce to 2 days with zero access delays.

gap_questions.question: What is the SLA for IT access provisioning?

gap_answers.G1: Currently no SLA — target is 4 hours

requirements.text: The system shall automate IT access provisioning for new hires on day 1.
requirements.rationale: To reduce delays in access provisioning and ensure new hires have the necessary access immediately.

requirements.text: The system shall provide real-time visibility into the onboarding status of each new hire.
requirements.rationale: To allow HR to track the progress of onboarding and identify any bottlenecks.
requirements.edited_text: The system shall provision access within 2 hours of onboarding initiation.

requirements.text: The system shall ensure 100% compliance document completion for new hires.
requirements.rationale: To avoid issues with missing or incorrectly filed compliance documents.

requirements.text: The system shall reduce the average onboarding time from 14 days to 2 days.
requirements.rationale: To meet the business goal of faster onboarding.

requirements.text: The system shall process IT access requests within a target SLA of 4 hours.
requirements.rationale: To ensure timely access provisioning for new hires.

requirements.text: The system shall eliminate manual email and paper processes in onboarding.
requirements.rationale: To reduce errors and improve efficiency in the onboarding process.

requirements.text: The system shall capture and store all compliance documents for new hires.
requirements.rationale: To ensure that all necessary documentation is available and correctly filed.

requirements.text: The system shall allow new employees to complete their own onboarding tasks.
requirements.rationale: To streamline the onboarding process and reduce HR's manual workload.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a mechanism for HR to track the time spent on onboarding tasks.
requirements.rationale: To measure and reduce HR's manual effort in the onboarding process.
